name: Contract Extension
description: Announces a player's contract renewal, reinforcing loyalty and commitment to the club. Positive, forward-looking tone.

subheadline.example: Ivanušec extends his stay at Main Venue until 2029

guidelines: Feature the player in a confident, proud pose — ideally signing the contract or with a pen in hand. Include a contract/pen icon element. The tone is celebratory and affirming. Use phrases like 'Committed', 'Here to Stay', 'Demo Brand through and through'. Hashtag #DynamoFamily.
